subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast one, O thou who art near unto God, O thou confident soul! In truth, in serving that near one of the Court of Grandeur thou hast shown forth a mighty hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صابره ای مقربه ای مطمئنه فی الحقیقه در خدمت آنمقرب درگاه کبریا ید بیضا
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
